settings.editor: India's Medtech Frontier — Bareilly, Uttar Pradesh

BMIIL is India's first dedicated medtech incubator in Tier-2 India — combining Bareilly International University's clinical infrastructure with world-class mentorship to take healthcare startups from idea to market.

Bed Teaching Hospital

Access via BIU

India's healthcare innovation is concentrated in 5 cities. Tier-2 India — home to 800 million people — has no medtech infrastructure. BMIIL is built to change that, starting from Bareilly with a model designed to replicate across North India.

settings.description_text: Direct pipeline to BIU's multi-speciality hospital for problem identification and validation.
Prototyping, biotech, and pharma labs across Medicine, Pharmacy, and Allied Health.
In-house guidance on CDSCO, FDA, AYUSH, and WHO compliance pathways.
Unique fusion track — scientifically validating traditional medicine with modern tools.

settings.editor: One of North India's premier private universities, BIU provides BMIIL's startups with direct access to clinical environments, advanced research infrastructure, and a multidisciplinary faculty across Medicine, Ayurveda, Pharmacy, Nursing, Dental Sciences, and Allied Health.

• Multi-speciality Teaching Hospital
  • NAAC Accredited Colleges
  • Industry Research Partnerships
  • Pilibhit Bypass Campus, Bareilly
For healthcare, biotech & medical device startups ready to build, validate, and scale. Deep technical support from ideation to clinical validation.

• • Medical devices & diagnostics
  • • Digital health & HealthTech
  • • Biotech & life sciences
  • • Lab access & prototyping
  • • CDSCO & FDA pathway guidance
  • • Investor & hospital network
For health & wellness startups ready to scale — with market access, investor networks, and international exposure.

• • Scale-ready startups
  • • Demo days & investor pitches
  • • Go-to-market strategy
  • • Corporate partnerships
Scientifically validating traditional medicine — where Ayurveda meets rigorous research, IP protection, and global market access.

• • Herbal products & formulations
  • • AYUSH & WHO compliance
  • • IP protection & patents
  • • Global nutraceutical market
Lower burn, massive patient access, authentic problem statements from an underserved healthcare market that investors are increasingly watching.
Direct access to BIU's teaching hospital gives startups immediate problem identification, validation partners, and pilot environments.
In-house mentors experienced in CDSCO, FDA, AYUSH, and WHO pathways — reducing time-to-compliance by months.
No other medtech incubator in India offers a credible, evidence-based Ayurveda + technology fusion track backed by university research.
Active pipeline to DST, BIRAC, Startup India, and international grants — our team actively facilitates applications and submissions.
200+ researchers across Medicine, Pharmacy, Biotech, Dental and Allied Health available as subject matter experts and co-innovators.
Led by practitioners, researchers, and institution builders — people who have spent careers in healthcare, not just business.
